account_enabled.description: Indicates if the user account is enabled (boolean)

age_group.description: The user's age group as a string (e.g., 'Adult', 'Minor')

business_phones.description: List of business phone numbers associated with the user

city.description: City of the user's physical address (string)

company_name.description: Name of the company the user is associated with (string)

consent_provided_for_minor.description: Indicates if consent has been provided for a minor (string)

cost_center.description: Cost center associated with the user (string)

country.description: Country or region of the user's address (string)

creation_type.description: Specifies how the user was created (e.g., 'Invitation')

department.description: Department name the user belongs to (string)

display_name.description: Full display name of the user (string)

division.description: Division name where the user works (string)

employee_hire_date.description: The hire date of the employee (string in ISO 8601 format)

fax_number.description: Fax number associated with the user (string)

im_addresses.description: List of instant messaging addresses for the user

manager_id.description: Unique identifier of the user's manager (string)

mobile_phone.description: Mobile phone number of the user (string)

office_location.description: Physical office location of the user (string)

onpremises_distinguished_name.description: Distinguished name from on-premises Active Directory (string)

onpremises_domain_name.description: Domain name from on-premises Active Directory (string)

onpremises_immutable_id.description: Immutable ID for synchronization with on-premises AD (string)

onpremises_sam_account_name.description: SAM account name in on-premises Active Directory (string)

onpremises_security_identifier.description: Security identifier from on-premises Active Directory (string)

onpremises_sync_enabled.description: Indicates if on-premises sync is enabled (boolean)

onpremises_user_principal_name.description: User principal name from on-premises AD (string)

other_mails.description: List of additional email addresses for the user

postal_code.description: Postal code of the user's physical address (string)

proxy_addresses.description: List of proxy email addresses for the user

show_in_address_list.description: Indicates if the user appears in the address list (boolean)

state.description: State or province of the user's address (string)

surname.description: Last name or family name of the user (string)

usage_location.description: Country code indicating the user's usage location (string)
